\tzpentry{ID3452}{Delta Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3452 introduces Delta Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \delta(x) = \lim_{\sigma \to 0} \frac{1}{\sigma\sqrt{2\pi}} e^{-x^2 / 2\sigma^2} \]
